headline: A Look At Evergy (EVRG) Valuation As Earnings Outlook And Q1 Expectations Improve
summary: Evergy earnings outlook puts upcoming Q1 report in focus Evergy (EVRG) is back on investor radar after raising its long term adjusted EPS growth outlook to 6% to 8% plus through 2030, and as it approaches a first quarter report where analysts anticipate a double digit earnings increase.
